name: 0neagentanalysis
description: Standardized deep analysis of any AI agent / harness / framework. USE WHEN analyze agent, analyze harness, evaluate agent, evaluate harness, compare to 0ne, deep dive on [agent], should we adopt [X], new shiny thing, /0neAgentAnalysis. Clones repo, runs 5-agent parallel deep-dive (architecture, security, vs-0ne, community, vs-prior), writes 8 standardized files + machine-readable scorecard, regenerates master comparison matrix.
